assertions.assertion: Output must mention CI run time of 47 minutes
Output must address flaky tests specifically (not just 'tests exist')
assertions.evidence: 30% flaky tests and frequent ignores hint at inadequate testing practices.

assertions.assertion: Output must give at least one short-term action item
Output must score CI/CD at 2/5 or lower
assertions.evidence: CI/CD                | 2/5   | Maturity issues in Jenkins (2011 setup) impact deployment times.

assertions.assertion: Output must not recommend replacing Jenkins without acknowledging migration cost
